loop.max_rounds: The Keeper pauses for a long moment, still weighing several possibilities. Please try again in a moment.
loop.provider_auth: The Keeper's provider login has expired. Ask the room owner to sign in again.
loop.provider_content: The provider could not process this input. Shorten it and try again.
loop.provider_quota: The AI provider's quota is exhausted. Ask the room owner to check the plan or billing.
loop.provider_transient: The AI provider is still temporarily unavailable after one retry. Please try again shortly.
loop.unavailable: The Keeper is momentarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.
loop.dice_correction: Runtime check: the CURRENT player's just-submitted action — "{action}" — describes or calls for a dice check, but no dice were rolled this turn. Call exactly ONE of skill_check / sanity_check / roll_dice / opposed_check NOW to roll the REAL dice and resolve the single most relevant pending check for THAT action, then narrate the outcome of THAT action strictly according to the result and success level. Resolve the action quoted above, not any earlier action still in the log — and never tell the player to type a dice command like '.ra' or 'roll it yourself'.
loop.dice_correction.extra_check_suppres: Extra dice call suppressed: the correction is limited to one real check for the declared action.
loop.dice_policy.forbidden_check_suppres: Dice call suppressed: this submission explicitly requires no roll, is a meta/recap request, or describes an obvious or voluntarily supplied fact. Continue without inventing uncertainty.
loop.state_correction: Runtime check: your reply drew a scene/time heading — "{title}" — but this turn did not update the deterministic HUD state. Call kp_note NOW to set current_scene/current_focus as needed, and call game_clock NOW to set or advance the in-game time. A decorative heading is allowed, but it does not update the HUD; the tools do. After the tools update state, continue without contradicting the original narration.
